metadata.description: Sidekick — AI coding agents as Claude sidekicks. Forge and Kay are the first two: they auto-install, configure themselves, and let Claude delegate coding work while it stays focused on planning and communication.

plugins.name: sidekick
plugins.description: Sidekick — a collection of AI coding agents as Claude sidekicks. Forge and Kay are the first two: they auto-install, configure themselves, and turn Claude into an orchestrator that delegates implementation while handling planning and user interaction itself.
